hard_stop.label: Hard Stop
hard_stop.description: Do not submit until this is corrected or explained with supporting documentation.

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: This may be valid, but it requires review and likely a clearer story or better supporting documents.

info.label: Info
info.description: Context that may matter for the claim but does not block submission by itself.

pass.label: Pass
pass.description: No discrepancy was found for this check.

next_action_templates.hard_stop: Correct this issue before submitting or resubmitting the claim.
next_action_templates.warning: Review this with the advisor, technician, or warranty admin and tighten the story or documents before submitting.
next_action_templates.info: Keep this in mind while reviewing the rest of the file.

summary_templates.ready: No hard stops were found. The claim can move to final manual review.
summary_templates.blocked: One or more hard stops were found. Correct them before submitting.
summary_templates.review: No hard stops were found, but warnings remain. Review them before final submission.
